'''鈭歞h-d-w-d''' ('''kadhadwedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:luteinise|luteinise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-d-w-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:luteinise|luteinise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-d-w-d
|-
! Lemma
| kadhadwedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhadwedoko|thidhadwedoko]] || [[word:jidhadwedoko|jidhadwedoko]] || [[word:shidhadwedoko|shidhadwedoko]] || [[word:kidhadwedoko|kidhadwedoko]]
